data.title: 国际服「Schale’s Special Valentine's Day Festivities」活动预约
data.summary: Have you seen the Valentine's Day invitation, prepared just for you? Choose which student you'd want
data.body:
Have you seen the Valentine's Day invitation, prepared just for you?
Choose which student you'd want to get chocolate from, and even receive a special letter!

⬇️Link to Pre-Registration⬇️
